body.text: The Seventh Circuit just upheld Illinois' AR-15 ban -- days after SCOTUS agreed to decide the exact same question

In Barnett v. Raoul, a divided panel reversed the trial-court injunction and doubled down on Bevis, with Chief Judge Brennan dissenting that Illinois has banned 'the best-selling rifle in America and its standard magazine.' Meanwhile, Virginia's statewide injunction is cross-conf

facts.title: 1. Virginia statewide injunction cross-confirmed; PSA 'back ope
2. Barnett v. Raoul: 7th Cir. upholds Illinois AR-15 ban
3. SCOTUS AR-15 case (Viramontes/Grant) re-fueled by Barnett

body.text:
• 7th Cir: divided panel upholds IL AR-15/mag ban, doubling down on Bevis
• VA: statewide injunction cross-confirmed; PSA takes orders for Jul 21
• 3rd Cir: Wolford/Hemani supplemental briefs due today at noon
• TX: Reload surfaces Talarico 2020 assault-weapon-ban video; $30M haul
